articles.title: BREAKING: 🇺🇸 Fed Chair Powell says he is "struck" by the growing number of cases of de-banked Bitcoin and crypto firms and he is "determined to take a fresh look at that."
OFFICIAL: 🇭🇰 Hong Kong confirms Bitcoin can be used as proof of capital for the new investment visa.

XRP ETF Filed with Nasdaq as Ripple-CFTC Ties Strengthen
articles.description: Nasdaq has applied with the SEC to obtain registration to exchange XRP and Litecoin using exchange-traded funds (ETFs). The filing, submitted on January 20, must fulfill the requirements under 19b-4 for exchanges wanting SEC approval to launch new financial products. XRP ETF Expectations Nasdaq documentation explains that proposed ETFs would fall under the Nasdaq Rule […] The post XRP ETF Filed with Nasdaq as Ripple-CFTC Ties Strengthen appeared first on The Coin Republic.

articles.title: Grayscale Pushes for Spot Cardano ETF in Latest SEC Filing
articles.description: NYSE Arca has filed with the SEC on behalf of Grayscale to launch a spot Cardano ETF, which would be the first standalone investment product for ADA if approved.

articles.title: ADA outperforms Bitcoin as Grayscale seeks approval for first US Cardano ETF in SEC filing
articles.description: Grayscale has applied with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to list a Cardano exchange-traded fund (ETF) on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), according to a Feb. 10 filing. This would mark the first US-listed ETF tied to ADA, providing regulated exposure to the digital asset. Following the news, ADA emerged as the […] The post ADA outperforms Bitcoin as Grayscale seeks approval for first US Cardano ETF in SEC filing appeared first on CryptoSlate.

articles.title: TRON (TRX) Coin Price Breakout Signals 505% Surge
articles.description: TRON (TRX) coin has gained market attention after breaking out of a logarithmic wedge pattern, indicating the potential for a major upward move. Market analyst JavonTM1 predicts that TRX could surge over 505% from its current levels, targeting a price of $1.11 or higher. The breakout aligns with historical price movements that previously led to […] The post TRON (TRX) Coin Price Breakout...

articles.title: Strategy Resumes Bitcoin Buying After Rebrand
articles.description: Strategy, formerly MicroStrategy, resumes Bitcoin purchases with a major acquisition, reaffirming its long-term BTC strategy amid market speculation.

articles.title: Japan May Approve Bitcoin ETFs and Cut Crypto Taxes
articles.description: Japan’s FSA considers approving Bitcoin ETFs and cutting crypto taxes from 55% to 20%, aiming to boost investor protection and market adoption.

articles.title: ADA Pumps 14% as Grayscale Files For Spot Cardano ETF
articles.description: The Cardano native token has surged double digits following a spot ETF application from crypto asset manager Grayscale.

articles.title: Top Altcoins ETF Approvals: Bloomberg’s Predictions
articles.description: Top Altcoins ETF Approvals gain traction as SEC considers filings for XRP, Solana, Dogecoin, and Litecoin, reflecting shifting regulatory policies in the U.S.

articles.title: ADA Price Surges as Grayscale Files for First-Ever US Spot Cardano ETF
articles.description: Grayscale, through NYSE Arca, has submitted a filing under the Securities and Exchange Act of 1934 to introduce a spot Cardano exchange-traded fund (ETF). This filing stands out from previous ones, representing a direct ETF launch rather than a conversion. Grayscale has not yet offered a standalone investment product for ADA, marking a new chapter in its investment offerings. Grayscale Files...

articles.title: Grayscale, NYSE Arca file to launch US-based spot Cardano ETF
articles.description: NYSE Arca has filed on behalf of Grayscale to launch the firm’s first-ever standalone Cardano ETF product.
